positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a stylized celestial fox (kitsune) sitting elegantly among abstract geometric stars and crescent moons. The fox should have a clean, flowing silhouette and a majestic, serene expression. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, gold leaf accents, and off-white space. The composition must be centrally focused, suitable for a circular print application, with intricate details emphasizing symmetry and clean lines. Highly detailed, vector illustration style, clean solid colors, high contrast, maximalist print readiness, ethereal glow, magical realism, tattoo flash style.
